Design_Description: Global average-pool FiLM conditioning on spatial tokens (γ·h + β) before cross-attention, identity-initialised.
Dual-pool FiLM conditioning (avg + max concatenated) on spatial tokens before cross-attention, identity-initialised.
Hierarchical spatial-block FiLM conditioning (4×4=16 blocks, shared MLP) on spatial tokens before cross-attention, identity-initialised.
